name: Sudden Strike 2 Gold
short_description: At the height of World War 2, take command of German, Russian, British, American and Imperial Japanese armies on battelfields across the globe. Sudden Strike 2 expands on all aspects of the classic RTS game with new units, maps and epic campaigns.
detailed_description:
NOTICE

This is a re-release of a classic game. Even though it was tested on a variety of modern Windows PC configurations, unwanted side effects such as video/audio glitches and crashes may occur. If you are encountering technical issues with this game, please visit the community forums for assistance and support.


About the Game

At the height of World War 2, take command of German, Russian, British, American and Imperial Japanese armies on battelfields across the globe. Sudden Strike 2 expands on all aspects of the classic RTS game with new units, maps and epic campaigns.

Features


  • 5 epic campaigns and a new combat theater: The Pacific!
  • Massive battleships, landing craft and trains
  • Command airfields and deploy aircraft
  • Mechanized units now have individual crews to command
  • Dynamic weather system
  • Contains "Sudden Strike 2", "Resource War" add-on and "Total Victory" map pack
  • Contains map editor for user-generated maps and missions

supported_languages:
English*, French, German*, Russian
*languages with full audio support
